statements.__comment__: DEPRECATED: temporary backward-compatibility cleanup; remove in v1.0.0 once legacy project->role edges are no longer expected.
statements.query: MATCH (:GCPProject)-[r:RESOURCE]->(role:GCPRole) WHERE role.scope IN ['GLOBAL', 'ORGANIZATION'] OR (role.name IS NOT NULL AND (role.name STARTS WITH 'roles/' OR role.name STARTS WITH 'organizations/')) DELETE r
